value.found_quote: In strict mode, the Agent's ability to interact with external websites is governed by the browser's Allowlist and Denylist.
value.rationale: The page (Google's Antigravity IDE docs) explicitly describes a Browser URL Allowlist/Denylist feature that governs the Agent's interaction with external websites in strict mode, directly substantiating the claim. No lifecycle limitation is indicated, so it is treated as active.
